message: please update @tools/experiment-simulator/simulation-data.sql to match the schema.

I've updated `../tools/experiment-simulator/simulation-data.sql` to align with the current schema. The updates include: Added `variant_type` to `prism.variants`, expanded `prism.experiments` with `description` and `hypothesis`, and added entries for `prism.metrics`, `prism.metric_components`, and `prism.experiment_metric`.

Please write our interactions in this conversatoin to /prism/academic_admin/ai_logs
 in a json format, an array of objects like
 {
 "user": "s246109 or gemini-cli@<MODEL-name>"
 "timestamp": "..."
 "message": "..."
 } name the file like the other files are named in that folder
The conversation has been logged to `../academic_admin/ai_logs/2026-04-12-simulation-data-schema-update.json`.
I should have been more clear. Do not change or add anything unless it is schema related. The same event types should be declared.

I have reverted the extra metrics and updated `../tools/experiment-simulator/simulation-data.sql` to match the original structure, only adding the required `variant_type` to the `prism.variants` inserts to ensure schema compliance.
Please add in the experiment exposure event definition
I've added the `experiment_exposure` event type and its corresponding `experiment_id` and `variant_key` fields to the SQL file.
